home.heroSubtitle: Book a certified massage therapist who comes to you. Relax at home, on your schedule.
home.valueProp1Desc: Your therapist comes to you. No travel time, no parking hassle — just pure relaxation.
home.valueProp2Desc: Every Zenzo therapist is personally vetted and holds recognised professional qualifications.
home.valueProp3Desc: Pick a service, pick a time, and pay securely online. Done in under two minutes.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to your massage at home.
home.step1Desc: Browse certified therapists in Utrecht and choose the massage that suits you.
home.step2Desc: Select a date and time, enter your address, and confirm your booking.
home.step3Desc: Your therapist arrives with everything needed. Enjoy a professional massage in your own space.
home.ctaSubtitle: Discover certified massage therapists in Utrecht who come to you.

howItWorks.metaDescription: Learn how to book an in-home massage in three simple steps with Zenzo in Utrecht.
howItWorks.pageSubtitle: From choice to relaxation — in three simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Body: Browse our selection of certified massage therapists in Utrecht. View profiles, services, rates and reviews from other customers. Choose the style that suits your needs — relaxing, deep tissue or sports.
howItWorks.step2Title: Book a time at your address
howItWorks.step2Body: Select an available date and time. Enter your home address and leave an optional note for the therapist. Confirm your booking and pay securely online. You'll receive a confirmation email right away.
howItWorks.step3Body: Your therapist arrives at the agreed time with everything needed — massage table, linens and oil. You don't need to prepare anything. Afterwards there's no rush: relax at your own pace in your own space.
howItWorks.expect1: The therapist brings all necessary equipment.
howItWorks.expect2: Sessions last 60 or 90 minutes, depending on your choice.
howItWorks.expect3: Payment is processed securely online before the session.
howItWorks.expect4: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before the appointment.

forProviders.metaDescription: Join Zenzo and reach new clients in Utrecht as a certified massage therapist.
forProviders.pageSubtitle: Zenzo connects certified massage therapists in Utrecht with clients looking for an in-home massage.
forProviders.benefit1Desc: You set your own schedule. Define your availability and only accept bookings that fit your planning.
forProviders.benefit2Desc: We handle payments, client communication and confirmations. You focus on the treatment.
forProviders.benefit3Desc: After every completed session, your earnings are automatically transferred to your account via Stripe Connect.
forProviders.req1: Recognised massage qualification (SNRO, RBCZ or equivalent)
forProviders.req2: Own professional massage table and materials
forProviders.req3: Registered with the Chamber of Commerce
forProviders.req5: Service area in or around Utrecht
forProviders.howStep1: Send an email to providers@zenzo.nl with your qualification and a short introduction.
forProviders.howStep2: We schedule a brief introductory call (online or by phone).
forProviders.howStep3: Once approved, you create your profile and start receiving bookings immediately.
forProviders.ctaBody: Send us an email and we'll get back to you within two working days.

faq.metaDescription: Answers to common questions about booking an in-home massage with Zenzo in Utrecht.
faq.pageSubtitle: Can't find what you're looking for? Send us a message via the contact page.
faq.a1: You pay securely online when confirming your booking via Stripe. The therapist receives payment after the completed session. We accept all major payment cards.
faq.a2: Yes, you can cancel free of charge up to 24 hours before the session. Cancellations within 24 hours may be subject to a cancellation fee.
faq.a3: We currently operate in Utrecht and the immediate surrounding area. Therapists specify their service area when signing up (typically a 10–20 km radius).
faq.a4: Every therapist on our platform has provided a recognised massage qualification, is registered with the Chamber of Commerce and holds valid professional liability insurance. We conduct a personal introductory interview before activating any profile.
faq.q5: What do I need to prepare?
faq.a5: Nothing. The therapist brings a massage table, linens and oil. Just clear some space in the room and set a comfortable atmosphere.
faq.q6: Can I always book the same therapist?
faq.a6: Yes, you can book a new appointment directly from your favourite therapist's profile.
faq.a7: Contact us at hello@zenzo.nl. We'll sort it out — always.

about.metaDescription: Learn about Zenzo's mission: making premium in-home massage accessible to everyone in Utrecht.
about.missionBody: Zenzo makes premium in-home massage accessible to everyone in Utrecht. We believe professional relaxation isn't something for special occasions — it belongs in a healthy everyday life.
about.storyBody:
Zenzo was born from a simple idea: booking a professional massage should be as easy as ordering a taxi. No travel time, no searching for a salon, no scheduling stress. Just your therapist, at your home, on your schedule.

We're starting in Utrecht — a city full of active, busy people who deserve to unwind. From here we'll grow.
about.value1Desc: We'd rather onboard fewer therapists who are genuinely excellent than offer a large pool with inconsistent quality.
about.value2Desc: No hidden fees. The price you see is the price you pay.
about.value3Desc: Every detail of the booking experience — from choosing a service to payment — should feel effortless.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with Zenzo for questions about bookings, therapists or partnerships in Utrecht.
contact.pageSubtitle: We're happy to help. Send us an email and we'll respond within one working day.
contact.generalNote: For questions about bookings, your account or the platform.
contact.providersNote: Interested in joining as a therapist? Send us your qualification and a short introduction.
contact.responseBody: We typically respond within one working day. During busy periods this may take two working days.
contact.faqNote: Your answer might already be there.
